title: 1.1: Tests that the retagger command with --tags flag assigns matching tags to documents based on content matching rules
1.2: Tests that the retagger command with --document_type flag assigns matching document types to documents
1.3: Tests that the retagger command with --correspondent flag assigns matching correspondents to documents
1.4: Tests that the retagger with --tags --overwrite replaces existing tags with newly matched ones
1.5: Tests that inbox tags are preserved when using --overwrite flag
2.1: Places the retagger integration tests in the documents test directory
3.1: All tests use Django's TestCase class or a subclass thereof
3.2: All tests use call_command to invoke the management command
3.3: All tests follow the test method naming pattern starting with test_
3.4: All tests set up test fixtures with matching rules before running the retagger
4.1: Tests create documents with content that matches the configured matching rules
